REMOVED FROM MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-24-2011. THE MATTER DID NOT SETTLE WITH THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT SHE IS UNCERTAIN WHO IS THE PROPER DEFENDANT, AND SHE IS NOT READY TO PROCEED TO TRIAL. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
